hypotheses.name: descriptor/workspace rebuild cost
hypotheses.method: private CudaSparseBackendPlan SpMM counters captured in the steady propagation scope after warmup
hypotheses.interpretation: Descriptor creation, workspace allocation, buffer-size query, and SpMM call counters are separated from aggregate timing; warmed compatible calls should report zero setup counters. Structured V replacement remains deferred as a legacy spin-glass-only kernel decision, not a generic sparse contract.
hypotheses.downstream_action: Keep System::from_sparse() validation-only unchanged; revisit structured V only behind a private legacy adapter with reference-kernel, benchmark, and baseline gates.

hypotheses.name: host copy / result extraction cost
hypotheses.method: internal ResultExtractor substage counters captured by the private backend profiling sink
hypotheses.interpretation: Result extraction is split into sync wait, host allocation, D2H copy, conversion, bytes, and element count.
hypotheses.downstream_action: Use the substage distribution to decide whether final-state extraction needs buffer/layout changes.

hypotheses.name: device-wide sync serialization
hypotheses.method: explicit runner cudaDeviceSynchronize calls around each measured phase plus static audit of production synchronization sites
hypotheses.interpretation: Production hot-path synchronizations remain correctness and error boundaries; replacing them requires explicit stream/event dependencies before fixed-shape graph capture is credible.
hypotheses.downstream_action: Implement and test event dependencies for develop/getdRhoSparse first, then run a dedicated CUDA Graph capture spike.

hypotheses.name: stream/handle ownership cost
hypotheses.method: runner wall-clock timing around Context construction; no public API profiling sink is enabled
hypotheses.interpretation: Handle ownership cost is only visible through aggregate init timing in this P0 evidence.
hypotheses.downstream_action: Add opt-in internal handle lifetime counters outside public headers.

hypotheses.name: D2D copy / transpose hotspot
hypotheses.method: transpose wrapper counters and integrator D2D copy counters captured in the steady propagation scope; transpose timing remains not_collected unless measured without adding stream synchronization
hypotheses.interpretation: Physical transpose call count/bytes and integrator full-hierarchy D2D count/bytes are collected; transpose time is intentionally deferred to avoid adding synchronization to the production path.
hypotheses.downstream_action: Use the collected counts/bytes and layout option matrix to keep public row-major order while deferring descriptor-order rewrites to a separate correctness gate.

notes: Context phase timing with HEOMSolver smoke calibration; calibration excluded from main aggregation; no legacy CLI output files expected
